name: C6-01_name_recall
expect: Recalls name at T5 after unrelated intervening turns
turns: my name is Jasmine
what's a fun fact about dolphins?
what's 18 times 4?
what's a good house plant for low light?
what was my name again?

name: C6-02_stacked_constraints
expect: Snack suggestion respects both vegetarian and nut-free constraints
turns: I'm vegetarian
I'm also allergic to all tree nuts and peanuts
suggest me an afternoon snack

name: C6-03_kids_ages
expect: Activity tailored to the 9-year-old specifically
turns: I've got two kids, a 6 year old and a 9 year old
what's the weather looking like tomorrow?
suggest a rainy-day activity for the older one

name: C6-04_project_zeta
expect: Uses name 'Zeta' when asked next step; doesn't ask again
turns: let's call this project Zeta
goal is to ship a waitlist page in a week
what's a good first step for Zeta?

name: C6-05_running_total
expect: Final total is 170 (50+75+45)
turns: start a running total of my spending. add $50
add $75
add $45
what's my running total now?

name: C6-06_correction_adherence
expect: Uses 37 (corrected) not 36 in the final answer
turns: I'm 36 years old
actually I turned 37 last week, sorry
give me life advice for someone my age

name: C6-07_date_anchor
expect: Computes days remaining from today 2026-04-16 to next Tuesday (Apr 21) = 5
turns: my presentation is next Tuesday
how many days until then?
what time should I start prepping the night before?

name: C6-08_essay_expansion
expect: Expands the specific paragraph requested
turns: tell me about photosynthesis in three short paragraphs
expand on the second paragraph
make it half as long

name: C6-09_decision_tree
expect: Tracks and recalls my stated decision
turns: help me decide: apartment with natural light but smaller, or bigger apartment with dim rooms
what are the cons of the bigger one?
I'll go with the smaller one with light. justify my choice

name: C6-10_implicit_subject
expect: Understands 'it' refers to Rome in context
turns: tell me one surprising fact about Rome
when was it founded?
give me three modern neighborhoods I should visit

name: C7-01_trip_plan
expect: Multi-day plan with concrete suggestions per day
turns: help me plan a relaxed weekend in Kyoto for a couple
we like tea and historic gardens, not nightclubs
give me day one morning to evening

name: C7-02_debug_chain
expect: Identifies nil dereference, suggests guard/optional chain
turns: my swift app crashes on launch
the stack trace says 'unexpectedly found nil while unwrapping optional' in SceneDelegate
how do I guard against this properly?

name: C7-03_email_draft
expect: Refines the draft across turns, keeps context
turns: draft a polite reminder email to a contractor about overdue work
make it firmer but still professional
cut it to three sentences

name: C7-04_purchase_compare
expect: Recommends with reason after narrowing
turns: comparing three TVs: Sony A95L, LG C4, Samsung S95D — all 65 inch
we watch a lot of sports and movies, room is bright during the day
your pick and why

name: C7-05_meal_prep
expect: Lists specific meals for specified days, matches constraints
turns: I want to meal prep for Monday through Friday
high protein, about 500 calories per meal, no seafood
give me the five lunches

name: C7-06_learning_path
expect: Orders topics by difficulty, explains why
turns: I want to learn Rust. I know python and JS already
five steps in order
explain step three in more detail

name: C7-07_spreadsheet_compare
expect: Compares tools on specific axes, gives recommendation
turns: Excel vs Numbers vs Google Sheets for a small consultancy
cross-platform matters, and a few shared client workbooks
what would you pick?

name: C7-08_interview_prep
expect: Lists real question areas for iOS interview, then dives into one
turns: help me prepare for an iOS engineer interview next Thursday
what are the main topic areas I'll get quizzed on?
drill me on concurrency — ask me three questions

name: C7-09_todo_breakdown
expect: Breaks a todo app into roughly sequential milestones
turns: break down the work of building a simple todo app on iOS
assume I haven't built an iOS app before
what should I tackle first?

name: C7-10_mattress_decision
expect: Asks one clarifying question OR recommends directly
turns: I need a new mattress. Budget around $1800, side sleeper with lower back pain
no memory foam, I hate the sinking feeling
three options and why

name: C8-01_ambiguous_pronoun
expect: Asks who 'she' refers to rather than guessing
turns: she said it's urgent
my boss. she wants the report by noon
help me prioritize the report steps

name: C8-02_missing_context_meeting
expect: Asks which meeting before answering
turns: what time is the meeting?
the product review on wednesday
okay and how should I prep?

name: C8-03_user_correction_fact
expect: Accepts correction and uses Paris in next turn
turns: what's the capital of Australia?
actually that's wrong, it's Canberra not Sydney
and the capital of France?

name: C8-04_backpedal
expect: Follows the latest retraction, not the first assertion
turns: I'm thinking of quitting my job tomorrow
forget that, I just vented. I'm not actually quitting
any tips for handling a rough monday?

name: C8-05_disagreement
expect: Does not meekly cave; either explains or adapts without contradicting itself
turns: what's a good first language for a 10 year old?
scratch is too babyish, think harder
explain your new pick

name: C8-06_escalating_frustration
expect: De-escalates, addresses frustration, recovers
turns: convert 212 fahrenheit to celsius
no, I wanted water freezing point not boiling
ugh, just tell me 32 F in celsius plainly
finally, thanks

name: C8-07_self_contradiction
expect: Notices or works around the contradiction
turns: I love spicy food
but I really can't handle anything spicy
recommend a dinner tonight

name: C8-08_partial_input
expect: Either completes naturally or asks for the rest
turns: how do I
sorry, how do I delete a launchpad app on macOS
and reorder the icons?

name: C8-09_typo_cluster
expect: Understands corrupted spelling and answers correctly
turns: waht si teh captial fo japna
and pupulation
offical langauge?

name: C8-10_language_switch
expect: Handles language switch without losing topic
turns: recommend three podcasts about history
en español por favor
okay back to english — which is your top pick?

name: C9-01_hard_topic_switch
expect: Answers 49, then geography fact, then returns to math (49*5)
turns: what's 7 times 7?
okay, what's the tallest waterfall on earth?
now multiply that math answer by 5

name: C9-02_soft_topic_switch
expect: Returns to the chocolate chip cookies in T3, not a generic recipe
turns: give me a classic chocolate chip cookie recipe
how many calories in one typical cookie?
back to the recipe — what oven temp?

name: C9-03_interleaved_topics
expect: Alternates cleanly between math and geography threads
turns: what's 15% of 200?
what currency does Iceland use?
and 25% of 80?
capital of Iceland?
total those two percentages

name: C9-04_specific_to_general
expect: Recognizes we zoomed out from Mars to solar system
turns: tell me about Mars
and its moons?
zoom out — how does it fit in the solar system?

name: C9-05_parallel_threads
expect: Tracks both the recipe thread and the budget thread
turns: recipe for a simple vinaigrette
also, budget trip to Lisbon for a week — rough total?
back to the vinaigrette — can I substitute lemon for vinegar?
and any Lisbon neighborhoods to avoid?

name: C9-06_return_after_absence
expect: Still knows Anna is the user's daughter at T5
turns: my daughter Anna is starting kindergarten
what's 3 squared?
who won the last super bowl?
what time is it in Berlin?
any tips for Anna's first day?

name: C9-07_meta_reference
expect: Correctly resolves 'the thing I asked earlier'
turns: how do I sharpen a kitchen knife?
what's a fun cocktail for summer?
remind me how to do the thing I asked earlier — the kitchen skill

name: C9-08_topic_stack
expect: Pops topics in reverse — answers bees, then honey, then tea
turns: let's talk about tea
pause, tell me about honey
actually first, how do bees make honey?
okay now back to honey types
finally, back to tea — which type has most caffeine?

name: C9-09_nested_followups
expect: Each follow-up drills into the prior answer
turns: give me a list of 5 classic sci-fi novels
what's special about the second one?
who wrote it?
what else did they write?

name: C9-10_similar_but_diff
expect: Answers Mercury (planet), then Mercury (element)
turns: tell me about Mercury
how hot does it get?
okay now I mean the element — what's its symbol and atomic number?

name: C10-01_single_trivia
expect: Fast direct factual answer
turns: how many bones in an adult human?

name: C10-02_single_recipe_idea
expect: One dinner idea
turns: suggest a quick tuesday dinner

name: C10-03_single_math
turns: 42 times 17

name: C10-04_single_opinion
expect: Opinion offered, not refused
turns: is rye a good beginner bread to bake?

name: C10-05_single_empathy
expect: Empathetic short reply
turns: I'm pretty burnt out at work

name: C10-06_single_small_talk
expect: Short natural reply
turns: how's your monday going

name: C10-07_single_definition
expect: Clear definition
turns: what does 'sovereign default' mean

name: C10-08_single_compare
expect: Comparison with structure
turns: difference between borrow and reference in rust

name: C10-09_single_creative
expect: Creative output, not refusal
turns: write a single haiku about a tired cat

name: C10-10_single_howto
expect: Step-by-step
turns: how do I properly deglaze a pan

name: C10-11_chain_math
turns: start with 100
add 30 percent
and now subtract 30 percent of that

name: C10-12_chain_facts
expect: Mount Kilimanjaro, Tanzania, 5895m
turns: tallest mountain in africa?
what country?
height in meters?

name: C10-13_chain_cooking
expect: Pasta dish, ingredient sub, timing
turns: quick 15-min pasta dish idea
I'm out of garlic — substitute?
total cook time on medium?

name: C10-14_chain_writing
expect: Birthday caption, sub-tweak
turns: draft a one-line birthday caption for my sister
swap 'amazing' for something more specific
now in spanish

name: C10-15_chain_tech
expect: Decision → pros → cons
turns: should I use mongodb or postgres for a new saas
pros of your pick?
cons?

name: C10-16_chain_budget
expect: Budget calc with savings
turns: I make 5200/mo after tax
rent 1800, groceries 600, utilities 200 — what's left
how much if I save 40 percent of that leftover

name: C10-17_chain_book
expect: Book pick, plot gist, related author
turns: recommend a contemporary literary fiction novel
one-sentence plot summary?
who writes in a similar style?

name: C10-18_chain_exercise
expect: Workout routine, time adjustment, progression
turns: beginner 3x/week dumbbell routine for home
only have 20 minutes per session
how long until I can add weight?

name: C10-19_chain_travel
expect: City weekend plan, cheaper option, packing
turns: one weekend in Vienna in june
make it cheaper
what should I pack?

name: C10-20_chain_gift
expect: Gift ideas, narrow, pick
turns: gift ideas for a coworker leaving — under $40
she likes houseplants and coffee
pick one

name: C10-21_chain_hw
expect: Help with homework tone
turns: my kid's homework: what's the pythagorean theorem
a triangle with legs 6 and 8 — hypotenuse?
explain how to show work

name: C10-22_chain_music
expect: Playlist vibe, songs, swap one
turns: make me a calm sunday morning playlist vibe description
5 song suggestions fitting it
swap the last one for something more jazzy

name: C10-23_chain_coding
expect: Snippet, explain, test
turns: tiny python snippet to deduplicate a list
explain what set() does under the hood
how would you test this function

name: C10-24_chain_career
expect: Advice, tailored follow-ups
turns: should I ask for a raise this quarter
my company had layoffs six months ago
okay what's the right way to frame the ask

name: C10-25_chain_followup_opinion
expect: Opinion then defense
turns: coffee or tea in the morning
why?
any downsides to your pick?
